phase_name: Bets, Settlement & First End-to-End Demo (House Markets Only)
head: efbacbd
note_on_plan: Phase 5 has NO formal /gsd-plan-phase PLAN.md; it is being built as additive atomic TDD commits. The authoritative handoff is .planning/phases/05-bets-settlement/.continue-here.md — READ IT FIRST.

completed_tasks.name: SC#1 place_bet — atomic ACID bet placement vs MarketReadPort
SC#4 sign-up bonus on email verify (grant_signup_bonus)
Settlement core: pure payout & P&L math (payout.py)

remaining_tasks.name: Capture odds-at-placement on Bet (extend OutcomeView.price + Bet.price + place_bet)
Confirm modal + per-market stake limits + sell->405
Migration 0005_phase5_bets (bets table + FKs to markets/outcomes) off 0004
First E2E demo: bet -> admin resolve -> wallet credited -> P&L

blockers.description: Alembic migration 0003 COLLISION: Phase 3 (wallet, unmerged, on this branch) and Phase 4 (markets, merged to main) both created 0003 off 0002. Renumber 0003_phase3_wallet_ledger -> 0004_phase3_wallet_ledger (down_revision 0003_phase4_markets) when Phase 3 lands on the Phase-4 main.
blockers.workaround: Resolve at Phase 3 merge; Phase 5 bets migration then becomes 0005 off 0004

blockers.description: Phase 3 (Wallet & Ledger) is NOT merged to main (app/wallet on main is only __init__.py). Phase 5 rides on top of unmerged Phase 3 and cannot complete/merge until Phase 3 lands.
blockers.workaround: Integration order: Phase 3 -> rebase Phase 5 -> finish Phase 5

blockers.description: Must confirm whether Phase 4 Outcome.current_odds is a probability in (0,1] or decimal odds, before feeding it to compute_payout(stake, price).
blockers.workaround: Inspect a created market row / HouseAdapter seed; if decimal odds use price = 1/current_odds

blockers_removed: Phase 4 (Markets Domain & HouseAdapter) is now MERGED to origin/main via PR #6 (eba7a41). The old 'Phase 4 not started' blocker on the Phase 5 integration items (real market models, admin resolution endpoint, bets migration, E2E demo) is GONE. Pol is now on Phase 6; Agustin takes Phase 7 next.

human_actions_pending.action: Coordinate with Pol on the Phase 3 merge + 0003->0004 migration renumber sequence
human_actions_pending.context: It touches the shared alembic chain; Phase 3 is the wallet phase and is still unmerged

human_actions_pending.action: Open Phase 5 PR via GitHub MCP create_pull_request from a REPO-ROOTED session (only Pol merges)
human_actions_pending.context: Home-rooted sessions have no mcp__github__* (the documented GOTCHA)

decisions.decision: Payout model = 'odds locked at placement': winning payout = stake/price, loser pays 0, no house edge in v1
decisions.rationale: .planning/research/ARCHITECTURE.md; FEATURES.md defers house edge to v2

decisions.decision: Split settlement into pure math (payout.py, plan.py — unit-tested, no I/O, reused by Phase 7) + transactional shell (gated)
decisions.rationale: Pure core takes price as input => zero Phase 4 coupling; buildable + verifiable before integration

decisions.decision: Idempotent settlement via existing transfers.idempotency_key='settle:{bet_id}' (no new constraint/migration)
decisions.rationale: Preserves single-alembic-head invariant; same zero-double-payout guarantee as the entries (bet_id,event_type) UNIQUE option in ROADMAP SC#6

decisions.decision: Did NOT churn STATE.md / PHASES.md on this branch
decisions.rationale: Both differ from origin/main; editing invites rebase conflicts. This handoff is the source of truth until the Phase 3 merge + Phase 5 rebase reconcile them

next_action: Read .planning/phases/05-bets-settlement/.continue-here.md fully. Then coordinate the Phase 3 merge + 0003->0004 migration renumber with Pol BEFORE writing Phase 5 integration code. Do not rebase blindly onto origin/main (0003 collision). Build the transactional SettlementService on the shipped pure core (payout.py/plan.py) after the chain is linearized.
context_notes: Post-PC-restart resume session. Phase 5 mid-flight on gsd/phase-05-bets-settlement @ efbacbd, working tree clean, 37 ahead / 16 behind origin/main (eba7a41). This branch carries the ENTIRE unmerged Phase 3 wallet code (that's the 37 ahead). This session added only the PURE settlement core (2 commits, new files in app/settlement/ + tests/settlement/, zero edits to shipped code, migration-free). Strategy is additive/low-risk. The big change since last context: Phase 4 is MERGED — re-evaluate everything under that. The integration is now a 3-way reconciliation gated by the 0003 collision, not a simple unblock.
